title: Multi-digit division
description: Practice dividing multi-digit whole numbers. These problems use remainders.
topic_path: Module 2: Arithmetic operations including dividing by a fraction
Topic C: Dividing whole numbers and decimals

assessment_items.question_content:
**$\Large{9393 \div 76 = ?}$**  
 *Write your answer as a whole number and remainder.*


[[☃ numeric-input 1]]$\text{ R }$ [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
hints:
$\begin{array}{rr}
&1\phantom{00}&\\
{76}&\overline{\Big)9393}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{76}{\downarrow}\phantom{0}\\
&\blue{179}\phantom{0}
\end{array}$

How many times does $76$ go into $\blue{179}$?

$\begin{array}{rr}
&12\phantom{0}&\\
{76}&\overline{\Big)9393}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{76}\phantom{0}{\downarrow}\\
&179{\downarrow}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{152}{\downarrow}\\
&\blue{273}
\end{array}$

How many times does $76$ go into $\blue{273}$?

$\begin{array}{rr}
&123&\text{R}45\\
{76}&\overline{\Big)9393}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{76}\phantom{00}\\
&179\phantom{0}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{152}\phantom{0}\\
&273\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{228}\\
&45
\end{array}$

There are no more digits to bring down. Since $45$ is less than $76$, it is left as our remainder.

assessment_items.question_content:
**$\Large{4842 \div 93 = ?}$**  
 *Write your answer as a whole number and remainder.*

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]$\text{ R }$ [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
hints:
$\begin{array}{rr}
&\phantom{000}&\\
{93}&\overline{\Big)\blue{484}2}\\
&\phantom{000}&\\
\end{array}$

$93$ is larger than $4$ and $48$, so let's look at $484$ instead.

How many times does $93$ go into $\blue{484}$?

$\begin{array}{rr}
&5\phantom{0}&\\
{93}&\overline{\Big)4842}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{465}{\downarrow}\\
&\blue{192}
\end{array}$

How many times does $93$ go into $\blue{192}$?

$\begin{array}{rr}
&52&\text{R}6\\
{93}&\overline{\Big)4842}\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{465}\phantom{0}\\
&192\\
&\mathllap{-}\underline{186}\\
&6
\end{array}$

There are no more digits to bring down. Since $6$ is less than $93$, it is left as our remainder.
